name: job-portal
description: Full-stack Job Portal — React 18 + Vite + Express + PostgreSQL + Sequelize

scripts.dev: concurrently --names CLIENT,ADMIN,SERVER --prefix-colors cyan,magenta,yellow "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix client-admin" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix client-admin && npm install --prefix server
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client-admin
scripts.lint: npm run lint --prefix client && npm run lint --prefix server
